source.title: Practice-Changing Trials in Gastrointestinal Cancers at ASCO 2025: A Critical Review and Clinical Context.

finding.description: CheckMate 577 reported mature overall survival (OS) data for adjuvant nivolumab in esophageal/GEJ cancer; however, OS benefit was not statistically significant in the intent-to-treat population.
finding.effect_summary: No significant OS benefit in ITT population for adjuvant nivolumab.

source_quote: CheckMate 577 reported mature overall survival (OS) data for adjuvant nivolumab in esophageal/GEJ cancer; however, OS benefit was not statistically significant in the intent-to-treat population.

source.title: Practice-Changing Trials in Gastrointestinal Cancers at ASCO 2025: A Critical Review and Clinical Context.

finding.description: MATTERHORN demonstrated significant improvements in event-free survival and OS with perioperative durvalumab plus FLOT in gastric/GEJ cancer.
finding.effect_summary: Significant improvements in EFS and OS with durvalumab plus FLOT.

source_quote: MATTERHORN demonstrated significant improvements in event-free survival and OS with perioperative durvalumab plus FLOT in gastric/GEJ cancer.

source.title: Practice-Changing Trials in Gastrointestinal Cancers at ASCO 2025: A Critical Review and Clinical Context.

finding.description: ATOMIC supported adjuvant atezolizumab plus chemotherapy in stage III dMMR colon cancer.
finding.effect_summary: Positive support for adjuvant atezolizumab plus chemotherapy.

source_quote: In stage III dMMR colon cancer, ATOMIC supported adjuvant atezolizumab plus chemotherapy.

source.title: Practice-Changing Trials in Gastrointestinal Cancers at ASCO 2025: A Critical Review and Clinical Context.

finding.description: BREAKWATER established encorafenib-based triplet therapy as first-line standard for BRAF V600E-mutant metastatic colorectal cancer.
finding.effect_summary: Encorafenib-based triplet therapy established as first-line standard.

source_quote: BREAKWATER established encorafenib-based triplet therapy as first-line standard for BRAF V600E-mutant metastatic colorectal cancer.

source.title: Practice-Changing Trials in Gastrointestinal Cancers at ASCO 2025: A Critical Review and Clinical Context.

finding.description: DESTINY-Gastric04 confirmed trastuzumab deruxtecan as superior second-line therapy for HER2-positive gastric cancer.
finding.effect_summary: Trastuzumab deruxtecan confirmed as superior second-line therapy.

source_quote: DESTINY-Gastric04 confirmed trastuzumab deruxtecan as superior second-line therapy for HER2-positive gastric cancer.

source.title: Practice-Changing Trials in Gastrointestinal Cancers at ASCO 2025: A Critical Review and Clinical Context.

finding.description: DYNAMIC-III trial demonstrated ctDNA-guided de-escalation reduces toxicity with outcomes approaching standard care.
finding.effect_summary: ctDNA-guided de-escalation reduces toxicity with comparable outcomes.

source_quote: DYNAMIC-III trial, demonstrating ctDNA-guided de-escalation reduces toxicity with outcomes approaching standard care.
